title: Preflight release metadata ownership scope
rawUserRequest: 发现发布 PR 被 Contract ownership 门禁挡住，先修正流程，在 finalizer 写文件前校验生成文件全部属于 Work Item scope。

declaredIntent.summary: 在发布元数据生成前验证生成文件与 Work Item Contract scope 一致。

intent.problem: Release metadata generated after archive can escape the archived Contract scope and fail only at PR CI.
intent.rationale: Fail before writing metadata when generated files are not explicitly owned.

problemStatement: The previous release PR omitted root release-state.json from the archived Contract scope and CI discovered it late.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Finalizer rejects incomplete generated-file scope before writing
Finalizer accepts a complete generated-file scope

riskAssessment.reason: Narrow fail-closed validation with focused regression tests.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized root process correction before publication.

preReviewWarnings: Review fail-closed behavior and generated path list.
acceptance: Finalizer validates all generated release metadata paths against Contract scope before writing.
Regression tests cover both incomplete and complete scope.
Reserve archive growth from 526 to 527 in this functional Work Item.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized root process correction before publication.

repaymentRecords: release_finalizer_scope_preflight|archiveGrowth|526|527|user|2026-07-24|Reserve process correction archive; repay during final plan cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert validator and regression changes together.
